name: 4pk Small Metal Plates Candle Holders Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Place your candles neatly with the 4pk Small Metal Plates Candle Holders Black from Room Essentials™. Crafted from iron, these black candle holders save the hassle of cleaning the dripping wax time and again. Designed to accommodate pillar candles, each holder can showcase one candle at a time, creating a focal point for your home decor. Whether you're setting the mood for a cozy night or adding ambiance to a special occasion, these versatile holders are a great choice.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
